backend/main.mo: Defines the main ICP actor with a generic HTTP proxy method `proxyUrl` and a `transform` query callback for HTTP outcalls.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that drops legacy stable variables (`googleSearchEngineId`, `googleSearchApiBaseUrl`) from the previous actor version, returning an empty new state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the `proxyUrl` React Query mutation feature to its implementation file `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` and associated components/test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and CSS custom properties for light and dark OKLCH color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Study Tools' with a neutral educational description and `noindex, nofollow` robots meta tag to prevent search engine indexing.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders `BrowserLayout` alongside a dark-themed Sonner toast notification provider.
frontend/src/components/AddressBar.tsx: Smart address bar component that detects URL vs. search input, syncs with the active tab's URL, and submits navigation on Enter or arrow button click with contextual icons.
frontend/src/components/BrowserLayout.ts: Main browser chrome component wiring together tabs, address bar, proxy/search mutations, and content rendering with navigation, reload, and home functionality.
frontend/src/components/CloakButton.tsx: Falcon cloak button with a dropdown to select a cloaking mode (about:blank, https://error, or a number string) that disguises the tab via `useCloaking`.
frontend/src/components/ProxyContent.tsx: Renders proxied web content inside an iframe, injecting a base tag for relative URL resolution and intercepting link clicks and form submissions to route navigation through the app.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Displays a list of Google/DuckDuckGo search results with title, snippet, and display URL, triggering in-app navigation when a result is clicked.
frontend/src/components/TabBar.tsx: Renders a browser-style tab bar with support for switching, closing, and adding tabs, showing a loading indicator on active tabs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCloaking.ts: Provides a cloak function that opens the current app in a new popup window disguised with a fake URL (about:blank, error page, or numeric string) to hide its true address.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query mutations for proxying arbitrary URLs and performing DuckDuckGo searches through the ICP backend actor, parsing HTML search results into a structured format.
frontend/src/hooks/useTabManager.ts: Manages multi-tab browser state (add, close, switch, update) with each tab holding URL, content, search results, loading, and error fields.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines the global CSS for the Cheetah Browser app, including a dark OKLCH-based theme with custom brand colors (orange, yellow, dark surfaces), Tailwind base/components/utilities imports, and utility classes for glows, scrollbars, and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens matching the CSS variables, custom border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations; includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the Cheetah Browser project state at version 3, listing one existing feature (proxyUrl React Query mutation) and three pending action requests covering backend Motoko HTTP outcall proxy, frontend mutation hook, and wiring the proxy into BrowserLayout.
